message:
Running command: # ORD-0047 when reading a second ODB - need to use a separate openroad call per file
# Use a loop with separate openroad invocations
ODBS=(
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/13-odb-setpowerconnections/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/14-odb-manualmacroplacement/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/15-openroad-cutrows/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/16-openroad-tapendcapinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/18-openroad-generatepdn/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/24-odb-applydeftemplate/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/30-openroad-floorplan/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/33-odb-setpowerconnections/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/34-odb-manualmacroplacement/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/35-openroad-cutrows/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/36-openroad-tapendcapinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
  "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/38-openroad-generatepdn/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
)

for odb in "${ODBS[@]}"; do
    if [ -f "$odb" ]; then
        result=$(openroad -no_init <<TCLEOF 2>&1
read_db "$odb"
set db [ord::get_db]
set chip [\$db getChip]
set block [\$chip getBlock]
set removed 0
foreach port_name {reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h reset_n_pad_a_noesd_h} {
    set bterm [\$block findBTerm \$port_name]
    if {\$bterm ne "NULL" && \$bterm ne ""} {
        odb::dbBTerm_destroy \$bterm
        incr removed
        puts "Removed: \$port_name"
    }
}
if {\$removed > 0} { write_db "$odb"; puts "Written" }
exit
TCLEOF
)
        echo "$(basename $(dirname $odb)): $(echo "$result" | grep -E 'Removed|Written|error' | tr '\n' ' ')"
    fi
done
